name: Pyra Magna (TFG)
description: The Leader of the Six Torchbearers, also known as the "Rust Renegades", Camien Warriors and Guardians of Iaconian Relics, with the ability to merge in pairs of Two, or all Six to form Victorion. Sixth of many of my Personal Takes on Characters from TransFormers by Hasbro. A few of my friends were making their characters on Janitor so I thought I'd give it a try!
creator: TheUnknown135
